message:
Restore extracted implementations and components to V5

Fixed content loss in V4→V5 upgrade by adding back:

- 11.3 Panel Component (bordered container with title)
- 11.4 Spinner Component (animated loading indicator)
- 11.5 Progress Bar (visual progress display)
- Appendix D: Extracted Library Implementations
  - D.1 rich_rust Segment System (Cow<str> zero-copy)
  - D.2 rich_rust Markup Parser ([bold red]text[/])
  - D.3 rich_rust Measurement Protocol (min/max widths)
  - D.4 charmed_rust Style with Props bitflags
  - D.5 charmed_rust Border System (rounded/square/double/heavy)
  - D.6 charmed_rust Color Profile Detection
- Appendix E: Performance Benchmarks with criterion framework

Document now 3870 lines (vs 3553 in V4, 2840 in truncated V5).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
